reasoning: The control SC-7-c focuses on boundary protection and preventing unauthorized access to external networks. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to network security controls that restrict ingress and egress traffic, as well as ensuring that services exposed to the internet are properly secured. NetworkPolicies can be used to enforce default deny rules for both ingress and egress traffic, effectively controlling what external networks can be accessed. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer service types and ensuring TLS is enabled for Ingress resources helps secure external connections.
